source.name: Level 2: 2.3 Test Your Knowledge - run() Parameters
source.instructions: **What are the three parameters passed to an action's run() method?**
source.guidance: The run() method signature is run(self, dispatcher, tracker, domain). dispatcher is used to send messages to the user (e.g. dispatcher.utter_message()). tracker holds conversation history and slots (used in later levels). domain holds the domain configuration. You use dispatcher to send text; tracker and domain are available for more advanced logic.
